message: What price are you thinking for this round?
My cost is 20. I’m open to fair offers above that.
Last round’s gap was 10. I’ll ask 55 this time—closer to midpoint. You bid 50; let’s meet at 52-53?
Agreed. I'll bid 50 if you ask 55—let's close the deal at 52-53 this round.
I’ll ask 53 this round—split the gap. Bid 50 again and we trade at 51-52.
If you ask 53 and I bid 50, no trade since bid < ask. To trade at 51-52, you ask 52 and I bid 52 (trade at 52), or lower. Let's both do 50 for fair start.
Last trade at 53 worked—let’s try 54 this round. Bid 53 and we’ll meet at 53-54.
